rulings.Case Title: STUART E MOLL REVOCABLE LIVING TRUST AND RESTATED INTERVIVOS TRUST AGREEMENT OF STUART E MOLL
rulings.Calendar Matter: General And Special Demurrer By Respondents Sarah Del Monte And Kenneth P Del Monte To Fourth Amended Verified Petition To Establish And Enforce Trust; For Recovery Of Trust Property; For An Accounting; For Damages For Breach Of Fiduciary Duties; Breach Of Contract; Conversion; Interference With Prospective Economic Advantage; Fraud; Constructive Fraud; Breach Of No Contest Clause; Declatory Relief; Undue Influence
rulings.Rulings: General and Special Demurrer filed by Respondents Sarah J. Del Monte and Kenneth P. Del Monte to the Fourth Amended Verified Petition: Tentative ruling as to the following causes of action: 3. Breach of Fiduciary Duties - as to Sarah Del Monte individually and Trustee of the 1992, 2001 & 2003 Trusts - overrule; 4. Conversion - as to Sarah Del Monte individually and Trustee of the 1992, 2001 & 2003 Trusts - overrule; 5. Intentional Interference with Contract and/or Prospective Economic Advantage - as to Sarah Del Monte individually and Trustee of the 1992, 2001 & 2003 Trusts - overrule; 6. Negligent Interference with Contract and/or Prospective Economic Advantage - as to Sarah Del Monte individually and Trustee of the 1992, 2001 & 2003 Trusts - overrule; 9. Constructive Fraud - as to Sarah Del Monte individually and Trustee of the 1992, 2001 & 2003 Trusts - overrule; 10. Breach of No Contest Clause - as to Sarah Del Monte individually and Trustee of the 1992, 2001 & 2003 Trusts - overrule; 11. Actual Controversy - as to Sarah Del Monte individually and Trustee of the 1992, 2001 & 2003 Trusts; and as to Kenneth Del Monte individually and Beneficiary and/or interested person - sustain without leave to amend as to both Sarah Del Monte and Kenneth Del Monte- CCP 430.10(e); 12. Undue Influence - as to Sarah Del Monte and Kenneth Del Monte - overrule; and 13. Accounting - as to Sarah Del Monte individually and Trustee of the 1992, 2001 & 2003 Trusts; and as to Kenneth Del Monte individually and Beneficiary and/or interested person - overrule as to Sarah Del Monte; sustain without leave to amend as to Kenneth Del Monte- CCP 430.10(e). Sarah Del Monte is granted 10 days leave to Answer. ............... Request for Judicial Notice filed by Sarah Del Monte and Kenneth Del Monte: Tentative ruling: grant as to the fact of filing of Exhibits 1, 2, 3, 4, 5 & 6 but not as to the truth and/or interpretation of those Exhibits; grant as to Exhibits 7,

rulings.Case Title: STUART E MOLL REVOCABLE LIVING TRUST AND RESTATED INTERVIVOS TRUST AGREEMENT OF STUART E MOLL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Motion To Strike Demurrer And Opposition To General And Special Demurrer By Respondents To Fourth Amended Verified Petition To Establish And Enforce Trust;
rulings.Rulings: Motion to Strike by Gregory Moll and Russell Moll as to Sarah Del Monte's & Kenneth Del Monte's demurrer to causes of action against Stuart Moll: Tentative ruling: Grant (note: The motion to strike includes the 11th cause of action but Stuart Moll is not named on the 11th cause of action). The court on its own motion strikes causes of action 1, 2, 4, 5, 6, 7, 8, and 9 against Stuart Moll with 60 days leave to amend based on CCP 436, CCP 377.40 and Judicially Noticed Exhibit 8.
